title: History and Autofill
drDigitalIntro: Safari remembers everywhere you go — that's History. Click Bookmarks > Show History or press Command+Y to see all the sites you've visited. You can search for something you saw earlier. Autofill automatically fills in forms with information Safari knows: your name, address, phone number, or credit card (if you've saved it). When you type in a form, Safari suggests what to fill. You can manage autofill in Preferences.
drDigitalSuccess: You understand how Safari remembers and helps with forms!
drDigitalHint: You can clear history if you want privacy — useful on shared computers.
